title: lomatia hirsuta subsp. hirsuta
intro: Lomatia hirsuta subsp. hirsuta, also known as the 'Erect Knotted Broomrape', is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lomatia hirsuta subsp. hirsuta include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of conditions such as cancer and neurodegenerative diseases. Herbal preparations of Lomatia hirsuta subsp. hirsuta can be found in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
